kpi_mappings.kpi_description: The total number of claims processed within a given month.
The average time taken to process claims from submission to resolution, measured in days.
The total number of claims that are currently outstanding and not yet resolved.
The total amount of premium collected from policy transactions within a given month.
The average sum insured across all coverage categories for policies in force.
The total amount of expenses incurred related to claims within a given month.
The percentage of claims that have been resolved compared to the total claims submitted in a given month.
The average premium amount collected per policy in force.
The total risk sum insured across all policies in force.

warnings: KPI 'Average Claim Processing Time (Days)' has join candidates, but none are certified.
KPI 'Average Coverage Sum Insured Amount' has join candidates, but none are certified.
KPI 'Average Premium per Policy Amount' has join candidates, but none are certified.
KPI 'Claim Resolution Rate Percentage' has join candidates, but none are certified.
KPI 'Claim Resolution Rate Percentage' needs numerator/denominator formula certification before gold SQL is production-safe.
KPI 'Total Claims Processed Count' has join candidates, but none are certified.
KPI 'Total Expenses Incurred Amount' has join candidates, but none are certified.
KPI 'Total Outstanding Claims Count' has join candidates, but none are certified.
KPI 'Total Premium Collected Amount' has join candidates, but none are certified.
KPI 'Total Risk Sum Insured Amount' has join candidates, but none are certified.
